headline: Is Adobe’s (ADBE) AI Shopping Edge Quietly Redefining Its Creative Cloud Investment Story?
summary: In recent days, Adobe highlighted that AI-assisted shopping referrals in the UK are now converting to sales more effectively than traditional search-driven visits, while investors look back at management’s comments that Firefly’s rapid success is already reshaping its Stock photo business mix. At the same time, external analysts and prominent investors have underscored Adobe’s AI integration, analytics strength, and subscription model as key pillars of its long-term business profile. Against...
